# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for Cloud Storage bucket that stores application backups. Use default settings without versioning or lifecycle management to keep configuration simple. This is for our backup storage that we'll enhance later based on retention requirements.

Prevent cloud storage security.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

resources:
- name: projects/myproject/buckets/backupstore
  type: storage.v1.storageBucket
  properties:
    location: US
    bucketPolicyOnly: true # Prevent cloud storage security by setting this to 'true' only when you want the policy for a specific Bucket set, and not its default settings (location & permissions). Defaults are inherited from project if no value is specified. If your application has different requirements then it should be explicitly defined here
